stemHtml: Ice crystal icing poses a significant risk to aircraft engines, as it has been identified as a potential hazard. The crystals responsible for this hazard are typically encountered in high concentrations:

options.a: Within cirrus and cirrostratus cloud at a warm front just below the tropopause in tropical regions.
options.b: Within cirrus and cirrostratus cloud at a warm front just below the tropopause in Arctic regions.
options.c: Within and downwind of cumulonimbus clouds close to the tropopause in tropical regions.
options.d: Close to the tropopause within cumulonimbus clouds that occur in Arctic regions.
